/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE DEFENDANT APPEARS IN COURT VIA ZOOM TODAY,//X:THE CO-DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE IS GRANTED,/EMMOD::  DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO TRAVEL OUTSIDE GPS MONITOR RADIUS TO FRESNO CA FROM 04-16-22 8:00AM UNTIL 04-17-22 8:00AM/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 07-22-22/DOP

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL AND ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SUBMITTED IN SUPPORT OF FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: NEIL HALLINAN/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-08-21 (10), 01-21-22 (60)/X: DA MOTION TO DETAINWITHOUT BAIL:/MO DENIED/X: DEFENDANT IS REMANDED TO THE CUSTODY OF THE SHERIFF FOR ELECTRIC MONITORING-GPS FITTING ONLY,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/WS/WEAP/CTORD: NO SOCIAL MEDIA/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 DAY/
